query:
SELECT 
  h.id,
  h.claim_number,
  h.vehicle_make,
  h.vehicle_model,
  h.vehicle_registration,
  h.incident_type,
  LEFT(h.incident_description, 300) AS incident_desc,
  h.incident_location,
  h.created_at
FROM historical_claims h
WHERE 
  LOWER(h.incident_description) LIKE '%cow%'
  OR LOWER(h.incident_description) LIKE '%animal%'
  OR LOWER(h.incident_description) LIKE '%zig%'
  OR LOWER(h.incident_location) LIKE '%zig%'
  OR LOWER(h.claim_number) LIKE '%mandava%'
ORDER BY h.created_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
